description: It's femininty celebrated and enhanced with this pair of slippers from Inc. 5. With it's sleek design and simple style, this pair works great both as an office ethnic wear and for parties. This pair comes with a shoe bag that helps you carry it around in ease. Heel: 3" Upper Padded synthetic leather footbed with extra cushioning along the back to mid foot length for absolute comfort and style Thong style straps, wider on the lateral side with bead work and thinner on the medial side, and has a toe separator to hold the foot in place in style Outsole Durable PU outsole with swirl pattern grooves on the forefoot and horizontal grooves on the heel for ultimate grip Sandal care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
